scripts.dev:full: npx --yes concurrently -k -n web,api,gate,ws -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w gate" "npm run dev -w signaling"
scripts.verify:release: npm run forge:test && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w api
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build -w web && playwright test
scripts.verify:grant: npm run verify:release && npm run test -w api && playwright test
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:release && playwright install --with-deps chromium && playwright test
scripts.forge:deploy:sepolia: cd packages/contracts && sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a; forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast -vvvv'
scripts.forge:deploy:sepolia:verify: cd packages/contracts && sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a; forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast --verify -vvvv'
scripts.forge:deploy:agent-market: cd packages/contracts && sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a; forge script script/DeployAgentSkillMarket.s.sol:DeployAgentSkillMarket --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast -vvvv'
scripts.forge:deploy:agent-market:verify: cd packages/contracts && sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a; forge script script/DeployAgentSkillMarket.s.sol:DeployAgentSkillMarket --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast --verify -vvvv'
